subject: Coming Soon to Auction - 2.24 AC Development Site | Minutes from Minneapolis-Saint Paul International Airport - Eagan, MN
text: Email from Jim Palmer Starting Bid: $150,000 ASSET SNAPSHOT Property Type: Land Land Area: 2.24 AC VIEW AUCTION PAGE INVESTMENT HIGHLIGHTS 2.24-Acre Site in Eagan's Corporate Center: Well-located parcel sits within one of the Twin Cities' most established suburban business parks. PUD Zoning Approved for Multiple Uses: Entitlements allow office, medical, and other commercial development without rezoning. Immediate Access to I-35E, I-494 & Hwy 55: Three major roadways connect the site across the entire Minneapolis-Saint Paul metro area. Under 10 Minutes to MSP International Airport: Proximity to the airport supports users and tenants serving regional and national clients. Surrounded by Retail, Hotel & Dining Demand: Costco, Sam's Club, Starbucks, and several branded hotels anchor the immediate trade area.   Michael Klar Director Investments Marcus & Millichap michael.klar@marcusmillichap.com C (000) 000-0000 O (000) 000-0000 License: MI 6501402890 Derek Schuster Senior Director Investments Commercial Property Auction Services derek.schuster@marcusmillichap.com C (000) 000-0000 O (000) 000-0000 License: TX 685656   BROKER OF RECORD | JON RUZICKA | MARCUS & MILLICHAP | LICENSE: 40583288   www.MarcusMillichap.com Real Estate Investment Sales | Financing | Research | Advisory Services Marcus & Millichap is a service mark of Marcus & Millichap Real Estate Investment Services, Inc. © 2024 Yes, continue sending me emails   By confirming your subscription you're granting us permission to email you.
